title: Diagram embed view component with lazy loading iframe
purpose: Renders a diagram embed view that displays an iframe with a resolved embed source, handling broken embeds and user interactions like selection and opening.
module_context: Exports a React component DiagramEmbedView that accepts props for embed kind, reference ID, project, session, theme, and interaction handlers. Also exports a helper function resolveEmbedSrc from milkdownEmbedBridge.

steps.content: Extract all props including kind, refId, project, session, theme, selected, onOpen, and onSelect.
IF the refId is missing or empty, render a broken embed indicator with styling.
ELSE resolve the embed source using the provided kind, refId, project, session, and theme.
Render a container div with appropriate styling and event handlers for selection and double-click.
Render a header section with embed kind and reference ID, and an open button.
IF the resolved source exists, render an iframe with the source and appropriate styling.
ELSE render a message indicating the embed is unavailable due to missing project or session.
